docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LOGARTA ROGELIO AMERISIAN TRAVEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,113.49 FILED BY RCT TRAVEL SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT LOGARTA ROGELIO AMERISIAN TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOGARTA ROGELIO AMERISIAN TRAVEL
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO ROGELIO LOGARTA, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RCT TRAVEL SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGARTA ROGELIO AMERISIAN TRAVEL $683.20 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $723.70, SETTLEMENT REACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
